headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://vercel.live https://*.vercel.app; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.vercel.app https://api.dgii.gov.do https://*.sentry.io wss:; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
